class.name: FestivalLocation
class.brief_description: A place on Kraed Maas, from the overworld down to a single room.
class.description: Locations form a hierarchy (overworld, building, sub-location, sub-sub-location) through [member parent_id], plus lateral [member connected_location_ids] edges. NPC schedules, items and events refer to locations by id. Locations are imported verbatim from Secret Census (see [code]SECRET_CENSUS_COMPATIBILITY.md[/code]); [member census_data] keeps the raw source record.

members.member: The raw Secret Census source record, kept so no exported detail is lost.
Ids of locations directly reachable from this one, outside the parent hierarchy.
Unique identifier used by the registry, schedules, items and events.
If [code]true[/code], the location is part of the main progression path.
If [code]true[/code], NPCs live here; see [member resident_npc_ids].
If [code]true[/code], this is an authoring template rather than a concrete place in the world.
Ids of [FestivalItem] resources found at or tied to this location.
Ids of [FestivalPlotHook] storylines this location takes part in.
Id of the containing location, or empty for a top-level overworld area.
Password phrase required to enter, or empty for open access. Learning it grants the matching [FestivalKnowledge] entry (see [method FestivalCensusImporter.password_knowledge_id]).
Ids of NPCs who live at this location.
